hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash
echo "📦 開始同步資料 $(date)"
# 資料庫連線資訊 SOURCE_CONN="postgresql://inidm:inidm@10.11.88.68:5432/idmdb" TARGET_CONN="postgresql://ceidm:ceidm@localhost:5432/idmdb"
# Table 列表與主鍵設定 declare -A tables tables=( ["connector_space_ad_person_details"]="cn, placeholder" ["connector_space_ad_group_details"]="cn, placeholder" ["connector_space_ad_organizationalunit_details"]="ou, placeholder" )
for TABLE in "${!tables[@]}"; do echo "" echo "🔄 處理資料表：$TABLE"
PRIMARY_KEYS="${tables[$TABLE]}" TMP_FILE="/tmp/${TABLE}_1_sync.csv" STAGING_TABLE="${TABLE}_1_staging"
echo "📤 匯出 inner 資料..." PGPASSWORD=inidm psql "$SOURCE_CONN" -c "\COPY $TABLE TO '$TMP_FILE' WITH CSV HEADER"
echo "🧪 建立 inter staging 表..." PGPASSWORD=ceidm psql "$TARGET_CONN" <<EOF DROP TABLE IF EXISTS $STAGING_TABLE; CREATE TABLE $STAGING_TABLE (LIKE $TABLE INCLUDING ALL); EOF
echo "📥 匯入 CSV 至 staging 表..." PGPASSWORD=ceidm psql "$TARGET_CONN" -c "\COPY $STAGING_TABLE FROM '$TMP_FILE' WITH CSV HEADER"
echo "🔁 執行 UPSERT（INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE）..." # 動態抓出所有欄位，產生 SET 子句 COLS=$(head -n 1 "$TMP_FILE" | tr ',' '\n' | grep -v -E "^(${PRIMARY_KEYS//, /|})\$" | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//') SET_CLAUSE=$(echo "$COLS" | awk -v FS=, '{for (i=1; i<=NF; i++) printf "%s = EXCLUDED.%s%s", $i, $i, (i<NF ? ", " : "") }')
# 取得所有欄位清單（含主鍵與非主鍵） ALL_COLS=$(head -n 1 "$TMP_FILE" | tr -d '\r')
PGPASSWORD=ceidm psql "$TARGET_CONN" <<EOF INSERT INTO $TABLE ($ALL_COLS) SELECT $ALL_COLS FROM $STAGING_TABLE ON CONFLICT ($PRIMARY_KEYS) DO UPDATE SET $SET_CLAUSE; EOF
echo "🧹 清理 staging 表與暫存檔案..." PGPASSWORD=ceidm psql "$TARGET_CONN" -c "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS $STAGING_TABLE;" rm -f "$TMP_FILE"
done
echo "" echo "✅ 全部同步完成 $(date)"
